title: Rules of Court 2021
text: Proof-of-concept sandbox entry. Order 9 Rule 6 of the Rules of Court 2021 (Singapore), within the Order dealing with the conduct of proceedings and pleadings. The full authoritative text is not reproduced in this sandbox; verify the current wording against Singapore Statutes Online (sso.agc.gov.sg). This entry exists so the verifier can confirm that the rule appears in the trusted dataset.
